query: select top 4000 pl_name,hostname,discoverymethod,disc_facility,disc_year,pl_orbper,pl_rade,pl_bmasse,pl_eqt,pl_insol,pl_orbsmax,pl_orbeccen,pl_orbincl,sy_dist,st_teff,st_rad,st_mass,st_spectype from pscomppars where pl_name is not null and hostname is not null order by sy_dist asc

data.disc_facility: Wide-field Infrared Survey Explorer (WISE) Satellite Mission
